experiences.summary: Promoted through progressive leadership roles; most recently serving as an organization-wide expert for mobile application development and system architecture.

summaries.item: Architected a "day-zero" native Android foundation using a modular-first approach, ensuring the codebase remains resilient against shifting executive requirements.
Engineered an interactive Gradle module-generation workflow that enforced project-wide namespacing and templated feature segregation to prevent architectural drift.

Coordinated a strict, cross-platform Design System governance protocol, eliminating hardcoded UI values by mandating 100% semantic role-token adoption (colors, spacing, typography) across Design, iOS, and Android teams.

Architected a centralized source-of-truth workflow with enforced PR restrictions, harmonizing component nomenclature and integrating directly with external string management platforms (GL Strings/Applanga).

Crafted a suite of interactive Bash scripts to streamline developer onboarding and feature contributions, automating the generation of templated module skeletons and dynamically configuring CI/CD pipelines to support alternative build tool integrations.
Served as Lead Architect for a flagship Android app with 3.5M+ active users, personally overseeing the implementation of a high-security in-app payment processing platform.
Designed a series of custom Bash scripts that automated credential setup and environment validation, reducing developer onboarding time significantly.

Defined and enforced rigorous repository-wide coding standards, elevating the team's architectural output and technical maturity through meticulous, file-by-file pull request reviews and proactive mentorship.
Engineered a new authentication platform and migrated 10M+ active users to a modern Android stack with zero downtime.
Pioneered a multi-file Version Catalog (.toml) and KTS migration, moving the build system to a fully type-safe, auditable Gradle configuration.

Directed a web development crew of 25+ developers at project peak for the online banking platform redesign, laying the groundwork for organization-wide patterns while coaching teammates on best practices in modern web development.
Worked hand-in-hand with designers and product owners to develop the administration portal for the newly launched peer-to-peer payment platform Zelle.
Delivered an Android FIDO authenticator proof-of-concept that spring-boarded the institutional adoption of Samsung Knox and multi-factor authentication (MFA).
Reduced deployment time for brand-specific white-label applications from days to hours through streamlined processes and tool enhancement.

experiences.summary: Worked with elementary students (during the summer) and high school students (during the school year) primarily focusing on Mathematics educational development and growth.
